ALSO REPORTED 4.70 INCHES OF RAIN IN ABOUT AN HOUR. REPORTED THAT THERE WAS PONDING OF WATER ON SECONDARY ROADS AS WELL AS FLOWING WATER AT LOW POINTS IN THE ROAD. THE WATER WAS FLOWING ACROSS THE ROAD FROM DITCHES AND FIELDS. ESTIMATED THAT THE WATER WAS 3 TO 4 INCHES DEEP.
SIGNIFICANT FLASH FLOODING IN PARTS OF GENESEO. WATER IN EXCESS OF 6 INCHES IN DEPTH. WATER LEVELS RETURNING TO NORMAL AS OF 1 PM.
